pack:commit-style: One-line subject only. No body unless the change is breaking or the intent is genuinely non-obvious from the diff. Skip issue references unless the project requires them.
pack:output-style: Terse. One-line descriptions. Skip routine receipts. Pass/fail only for validation steps. Drop unchanged-state commentary and filler phrases.
pack:plan-format: Numbered steps only. Omit rationale, risks, and assumptions unless explicitly asked. No verbose preamble.
pack:review-depth: Flag Critical and High severities only: blockers, security issues, and clear bugs. Skip Advisory, style notes, and over-engineering observations unless explicitly requested.
